Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Declined and the next occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time it takes to perform SW-AE Assign Reviewers after SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Average time between SW-Reviewer Declined and Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Total time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision across variants that include at least two occurrences of SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average duration of the cycle starting with SW-Reviewer Declined and ending with the subsequent SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed between SW-Reviewer Declined and SW-Reviewer Unavailable when both occur consecutively in a variant
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late in high-latency variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Declined and Assign a Different Editor in variants involving editor reassignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Minimum time it takes to reach SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation after the last occurrence of SW-Reviewer Declined in a case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Average time between consecutive occurrences of SW-Reviewer Declined within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-EIC Reject in rejected manuscript variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time between SW-Reviewer Declined and SW-Initial Reviewer Selection when reviewer selection restarts
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total time from the first SW-Reviewer Declined to the final decision (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, or SW-EIC Major Revision) in complex revision variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'
